scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace @ddre/contracts && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && vite build
scripts.build:native: npm run build:web && npm run tauri:check
scripts.tauri:build: env -u GTK_PATH -u GTK_EXE_PREFIX -u GIO_MODULE_DIR -u LOCPATH -u GDK_PIXBUF_MODULEDIR -u GDK_PIXBUF_MODULE_FILE -u GI_TYPELIB_PATH -u GTK_IM_MODULE_FILE tauri build
scripts.tauri:dev: env -u GTK_PATH -u GTK_EXE_PREFIX -u GIO_MODULE_DIR -u LOCPATH -u GDK_PIXBUF_MODULEDIR -u GDK_PIXBUF_MODULE_FILE -u GI_TYPELIB_PATH -u GTK_IM_MODULE_FILE WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 tauri dev
